requirement_topic.en: AERS Storage Activity and EMS Grid-Connection Review

summary.en: Serbia regulates electricity-market storage activities through AERS and the transmission or distribution operators, and storage projects may require project registration, market-participation, and grid-connection review depending on whether the BESS is standalone, paired with generation, behind-the-meter, or connected through EMS transmission/distribution interfaces. EMS or the relevant distribution operator may impose grid-code, protection, metering, power-quality, communication, dispatch, and acceptance-test requirements separate from product CE or EN evidence.
summary.zh: 塞尔维亚通过AERS以及输配电运营方监管电力市场储能活动。储能项目是否需要项目备案、市场参与及并网审查，取决于BESS是独立储能、与发电配套、用户侧，还是通过EMS输配电接口接入。EMS或相关配电运营方可能提出电网规范、保护、计量、电能质量、通信、调度及验收测试要求，这些要求独立于产品CE或EN证据。
summary.zht: 塞爾維亞透過AERS以及輸配電營運方監管電力市場儲能活動。儲能項目是否需要項目備案、市場參與及併網審查，取決於BESS是獨立儲能、與發電配套、用戶側，還是透過EMS輸配電接口接入。EMS或相關配電營運方可能提出電網規範、保護、計量、電能品質、通訊、調度及驗收測試要求，這些要求獨立於產品CE或EN證據。

standards_or_laws: Serbian electricity-market legislation and AERS requirements for storage activities
EMS transmission and distribution grid-connection procedures

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage systems connected to power systems, together with grid-company technical specifications and project acceptance rules. This is useful engineering evidence, but it does not replace AERS status analysis, Serbian operator grid-connection approval, or Serbian market-participation documentation.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB/T 36558-2023管理接入电力系统的电化学储能系统，并结合电网企业技术规范和项目验收规则。这些可作为工程证据，但不能替代AERS身份判断、塞尔维亚电网企业并网批准或塞尔维亚市场参与文件。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB/T 36558-2023管理接入電力系統的電化學儲能系統，並結合電網企業技術規範和項目驗收規則。這些可作為工程證據，但不能替代AERS身份判斷、塞爾維亞電網企業併網批准或塞爾維亞市場參與文件。

standards_or_laws: China grid-company interconnection and project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: A Serbia-bound BESS package should separate product compliance from project authorization. Exporters should provide grid studies, PCS settings, protection coordination, single-line diagrams, communication protocols, metering interfaces, site acceptance procedures, and Serbian-language operating documents for the Serbian project owner and grid operator.
gap.zh: 发往塞尔维亚的BESS资料包应区分产品合规与项目授权。出口商应向塞尔维亚项目业主和电网企业提供电网研究、PCS参数、保护配合、单线图、通信协议、计量接口、现场验收程序和塞尔维亚语运行文件。
gap.zht: 發往塞爾維亞的BESS資料包應區分產品合規與項目授權。出口商應向塞爾維亞項目業主和電網企業提供電網研究、PCS參數、保護配合、單線圖、通訊協定、計量接口、現場驗收程序和塞爾維亞語運行文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project requires AERS status, market participation, or grid-operator connection approval; exact route depends on project configuration and connection point
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36558-2023 is recommended as a GB/T standard but may be required by grid-company project review or procurement

source.publisher: Energy Agency of the Republic of Serbia (AERS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE, EN, and GB test reports do not grant AERS status or grid connection. Treat Serbian storage permitting and grid acceptance as a separate workstream from product certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CE、EN及GB检测报告不会自动取得AERS身份或并网批准。应将塞尔维亚储能许可及电网验收作为独立于产品认证的工作流处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CE、EN及GB檢測報告不會自動取得AERS身份或併網批准。應將塞爾維亞儲能許可及電網驗收作為獨立於產品認證的工作流處理。
